---
title: "Model Distributions"
author: "Marius 't Hart"
date: "2026-07-16"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source('R/model_sims.R')
```

## Model Distributions

Here are the data and model distributions for adaptation:

```{r adapt_distr_plots, fig.width=8, fig.height=10}
plotDataAndFits(signal='adapt')
```


And here are the data and model distributions for aiming:

```{r aiming_distr_plots, fig.width=8, fig.height=10}
plotDataAndFits(signal='aiming')
```
